expectations.text: Uses tea.WindowSizeMsg to store width and height on the model
expectations.evidence: case tea.WindowSizeMsg: m.width = msg.Width; m.height = msg.Height

expectations.text: Defines a header style with a background color using lipgloss.NewStyle()
Defines a status bar style using lipgloss.NewStyle()
Uses lipgloss.JoinVertical to compose header + body + status bar
expectations.evidence: lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, header, body, status) in renderShell()

expectations.text: Status bar content varies by current state (shows different text for listView vs titleView vs bodyView)
expectations.evidence: switch m.state in renderStatusBar() sets LIST/TITLE/BODY with distinct hints

expectations.text: Sets Width(m.width) on header and/or status bar so they fill the terminal width
Uses correct v2 import paths (charm.land/bubbletea/v2 and charm.land/lipgloss/v2)
Body height accounts for header and status bar heights
expectations.evidence: bodyH := m.height - headerH - statusH using lipgloss.Height() to measure
